CustomField.description: This field displays the sum of the Actual Interest Rate and Cost of Funds, minus the Assumed Interest Rate. It is for informational purposes only and does not impact any calculations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field displays the sum of the Actual Interest Rate and Cost of Funds, minus the Assumed Interest Rate. It is for informational purposes only and does not impact any calculations.
CustomField.label: Final Interest Rate
